name: Rift Sweepers
short_description: Rift Sweepers is a 1-4 player co-op third-person shooter. As a Rift Sweeper, you will travel between dimensions and clear missions to protect the universe from collapsing. You will encounter strange and wacky enemies in odd and exciting challenges ahead.
detailed_description:
Rift Sweepers is a 1-4 player co-op third-person shooter. As a Rift Sweeper, you will travel between dimensions and clear missions to protect the universe from collapsing. You will encounter strange and wacky enemies in odd and exciting challenges ahead.

1-4 PLAYER CO-OP

Figure out how best to clear each mission alone or as a team. When playing as a team, identifying how to distribute roles for each mission and collaborating will make a huge difference.

4 UNIQUE CHARACTERS


Each character has unique weapons and abilities. The rifleman can move quickly and perform consecutive attacks. The sharpshooter can deal heavy damage. The demolisher is able to use a minigun to create explosions around him. The engineer can install turrets and give powerful buffs to his team.

MISSIONS


As you travel through different dimensions, you'll encounter various missions that are strange and odd. These missions can be cleared alone while teaming up with friends will enhance your experience.

BATTLES


You'll encounter numerous enemies in whacky shapes and proportions. Evade enemies' attacks and find their weak points to destroy them.

DISCORD:
